conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Emily and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data workflows and gain valuable insights. I came across Stackby and was impressed with the work you're doing in the no-code database and spreadsheet space. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We're doing okay, I suppose. We've got a lot of data coming in from various sources, and we're using a combination of tools to manage it. But to be honest, I'm not sure we're getting the most out of our data. What makes DeepData AI different from other solutions out there?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our solution uses machine learning algorithms to automate data processing and provide real-time insights. We've seen our customers reduce their data processing time by up to 70% and increase their revenue by up to 20%. We've also integrated with popular tools like Stackby, so you can easily incorporate our solution into your existing workflows.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but I have to say, we're already invested in a few different tools, and I'm not sure we're looking to add another one to the mix. Plus, I've heard that machine learning solutions can be pretty pricey. What kind of pricing are we talking about here?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is competitive, and we offer a tiered pricing model to fit different company sizes and needs. For a company like yours, I'd estimate the cost would be around $5,000 per month. But like I said, our customers have seen significant returns on investment, so we're confident that our solution can pay for itself.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: $5,000 per month is a bit steeper than I was expecting. And to be honest, I'm not sure we're ready to make a decision on a new data processing solution right now. We're in the middle of implementing some other projects, and I'd need to check with our team to see if this is something we can prioritize.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. It's always important to prioritize and make sure that any new solution aligns with your company's goals. Can I schedule a follow-up call to check in with you in a few weeks and see if anything has changed?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: No, I don't think that will be necessary. We'll need to discuss this internally and explore other options. But I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now. Thank you for reaching out, though.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's pricing concerns and potentially offer a more flexible pricing model or a trial period to alleviate the cost barrier. Sentiment: Neutral
